verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I remember way back When the Lord come up on resurrection morn, All the graves were opened and the saints began to rise; There's a promise for today That the dead in Christ are gonna come up first, And together we'll take our mansion in the sky.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I will rise for my everlasting prize, There's a resurrection promise in my eyes; At the dawn, I believe that I'll be good as gone, It will come as no surprise, I know that I will rise.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There are scoffers all around That say that everything's just the same, And the promise they will laugh and criticize; But one day they'll see that gravity's gonna lose its hold on me, They don't realize everything in Christ will rise.
